channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-06 09:56 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk says Orbital AI Data Centers will be easier than Communication Satellites for SpaceX: "The...
item.description: Elon Musk says Orbital AI Data Centers will be easier than Communication Satellites for SpaceX: "The Starlink V3 communications satellites is an incredibly complex machine. The AI Data Center will be much simpler by comparison. It’s really just solar power, plus radiator, some basic equipment, and the laser links would connect to the Starlink communications constellation, and then to the ground."

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 is the set of all things
item.description: 𝕏 is the set of all things

item.title: @elonmusk: The car that used to be in my garage is currently in an Earth-Mars elliptical orbit and will be ther...
item.description: The car that used to be in my garage is currently in an Earth-Mars elliptical orbit and will be there for at least 10 million years

item.title: @elonmusk: 23 year old Sudanese migrant Abubaker Mohamad Awad, stabbed 19 year old Tommie Lindhn to death in hi...
item.description: 23 year old Sudanese migrant Abubaker Mohamad Awad, stabbed 19 year old Tommie Lindhn to death in his own apartment in Härnösand, Sweden after Lindhn tried to stop Awad from raping a Swedish girl at knife point. After killing Tommie, Awad continued to rape the young girl next to Tommies dead body. The Sudanese migrant had already previously been convicted of several crimes, including sexual harassment, drug offences & shoplifting. Had he been deported, Tommie would still be alive. The media painted Tommie as Far Right, implied he was racist & that his life didn’t matter. Tommie’s life DID Matter, all White Lives Matter. Tommie Lindhn was a HERO R.I.P Tommie 🤍🕊️ There is no justice without completely overhauling the broken system in the West & without Remigration. Locking up violent foreign criminals AFTER they kill does not stop the next innocent person from losing their life. No justice, no peace.

item.title: @elonmusk: Last night, I read the entirety of C.S. Lewis' The Screwtape Letters. It's a novel told in the form ...
item.description: Last night, I read the entirety of C.S. Lewis' The Screwtape Letters. It's a novel told in the form of letters written by a demon to another demon instructing him on ways to manipulate his "patient" to do evil. This one quote sounded familiar.

item.title: @elonmusk: What does it feel like to be British? It feels like being a second class citizen in your own country...
item.description: What does it feel like to be British? It feels like being a second class citizen in your own country, paying for foreigners to loot and rape you, while your rulers call you evil if you complain.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX has launched in 7 years almost as many satellites as every government and private company in ...
item.description: SpaceX has launched in 7 years almost as many satellites as every government and private company in the world did since the 50s

item.title: @elonmusk: 3-5 years for a throwing a traffic cone is wild when Hamid Safi, a Rochdale child rape gang member, ...
item.description: 3-5 years for a throwing a traffic cone is wild when Hamid Safi, a Rochdale child rape gang member, only received 4 years. This is how disposable white lives are to them.
